title: Uragoga apocynifolia
taxonomy: Uragoga apocynifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Uragoga, which is a group of plants native to tropical Africa. The plant is a type of climber or vine, and its classification is also associated with the order Gentianales. Uragoga apocynifolia is further classified as a species within the kingdom Plantae. The plant's classification helps in understanding its characteristics, growth habits, and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
